title: pyrus coronaria var. fragrans
intro: Pyrus coronaria var. fragrans, also known as the fragrant white pear, is a variety of the Pyrus coronaria plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family, characterized by its fragrant white flowers and edible fruits. The medicinal properties of this plant include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an antibacterial agent. The health benefits of consuming Pyrus coronaria var. fragrans include improving digestion, reducing symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, and supporting immune function. Pyrus coronaria var. fragrans can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or syrup, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
